summary: Big @ Context remains done for the P0 demo path after a fresh coordination and implementation check: references are parsed and resolved from adapter-backed matter memory, rendered in the matter-scoped Command Center through ReferencePreview, visible with resolved/ambiguous/missing semantics, exposed with read-only autocomplete candidates, and preserved as explicit audit candidates without silently binding ambiguous or missing references.
contractsChanged: Adapter-backed Matter References UI now renders read-only Big @ autocomplete candidates
Autocomplete candidates are generated from createBigAtAutocompleteCandidates over the adapter-derived matter memory index
Autocomplete UI is display-only and does not mutate memo, audit, or professional output state
Ambiguous and missing Big @ references remain explicit audit candidates and are not promoted into referenced_artifacts
P0 demo coverage includes desktop and mobile matter-scoped AgentOps route validation for Big @ visibility
testsRun: cd frontend && ALETHEIA_UI_SMOKE_FRONTEND_PORT=3520 ALETHEIA_UI_SMOKE_BACKEND_PORT=3521 npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts --project=desktop-chromium

cd frontend && ALETHEIA_UI_SMOKE_FRONTEND_PORT=3530 ALETHEIA_UI_SMOKE_BACKEND_PORT=3531 npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts --project=mobile-chromium
risks: Big @ is complete for the P0 adapter-backed demo path but remains view-layer/local resolution until unresolved reference persistence semantics are accepted.
@Clause is not a new persisted ArtifactType; it currently resolves to supporting evidence_item refs with clause/chunk metadata.
Autocomplete candidates are currently visible suggestions only; there is no note or memo editor insertion behavior yet.
needs: Post-P0: wire createBigAtAutocompleteCandidates into an actual note or memo editor insertion workflow once that editor surface is owned.
Post-P0: persist unresolved and ambiguous reference records through the approved audit/reference persistence contract.
